content.text: can you update @apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx so that the filter icon comes after the Sessions text button

<SYSTEM_NOTICE>
Earlier context was compacted. Summary of your actions after the request above:
Files read:
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:462-480

Files edited:
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:467-477

Commands ran:
</SYSTEM_NOTICE>

The change is in place. The "Sessions" text button now comes first, followed by the filter icon (`action`).

I've updated the `ThreadSection` component in `agent-sidebar.tsx` so that the filter icon renders **after** the "Sessions" text button. Previously the order was:

1. Filter icon (`action`)
2. Sessions text button

Now it's:

1. Sessions text button
2. Filter icon (`action`)

Since the parent container uses `flex ... items-center gap-1`, the visual order simply follows DOM order, so no additional styling changes were needed. The text button retains `flex-1` (so it takes up the available space) and the filter action stays `shrink-0` (so it sits neatly at the end).

The task is complete. Note: there's no `submit_and_exit` tool available in my current toolset, so I'm concluding here — the requested change has been made and verified.
can you make the filter icon smaller?

<SYSTEM_NOTICE>
Earlier context was compacted. Summary of your actions after the request above:
Files read:


Files edited:
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:217-217

Commands ran:
</SYSTEM_NOTICE>

Done. I changed the `Filter` icon from `size-4` (1rem / 16px) to `size-3` (0.75rem / 12px), making it smaller. The surrounding button (`size-8`) remains unchanged, so the icon now appears smaller within its clickable area.

awesome! the Sessions button has a space or padding in front of the text that doesnt match the New Session and Search buttons above it. can you update it to make sure the Sessions button spacing or padding matches the buttons above it?

<SYSTEM_NOTICE>
Earlier context was compacted. Summary of your actions after the request above:
Files read:
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/ui/button.tsx:1-45
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:250-300
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:240-251

Files edited:
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:469-469

Commands ran:
grep -rn "sidebarItem\|sidebarText\|sidebar:\|variant" /Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/deskto...</SYSTEM_NOTICE>

I removed the left padding (`px-2` → `pl-0 pr-2`) on the "Sessions" text button.

Here's the reasoning:
- The **New Session** and **Search** buttons have no horizontal padding on their containers; their icon content starts at `px-3` (12px) from the sidebar edge.
- The **Sessions** button sits inside the scroll area's inner container which already applies `px-3` (12px). On top of that, the button had its own `px-2` (8px), pushing the "Sessions" text to ~20px — misaligned with the buttons above.

By removing the button's left padding (`pl-0`), the "Sessions" text now starts at the same 12px offset from the sidebar edge, matching the alignment of the icons in the "New Session" and "Search" buttons above it. I kept `pr-2` so there's still spacing before the filter icon on the right.
can you also rmove that spacing from the “Show more” button at the end of the Sessions list in the sidebar?

<SYSTEM_NOTICE>
Earlier context was compacted. Summary of your actions after the request above:
Files read:
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:354-380
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:356-368

Files edited:
/Users/example/dev/cline/apps/examples/desktop-app/webview/components/agent-sidebar.tsx:358-457

Commands ran:


Your recent responses:
The edit was applied correctly (the diff is just showing line-number shifts). Let me verify the "Show more" button now has the `pl-0` class.</SYSTEM_NOTICE>

The "Show more" button now has `className="pl-0"`, which overrides the `px-3` left padding from the `sidebarText` variant. 

Since the `Button` component uses `cn(buttonVariants({ variant, size, className }))` (which uses `tailwind-merge` via `cn`), the `pl-0` correctly wins over the variant's `px-3` for the left side, while the right padding stays intact. The "Show more" text now aligns with the "Sessions" label and the icons of the "New Session" / "Search" buttons above.
